selectionLogic: Stratified across confidence, gatedness, buildability, MCP status, API style, and category coverage.

claim.apiSurface: Public API documentation appears limited compared with Slack-style platforms.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Pumble MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: API breadth and credential access need confirmation.

claim.apiSurface: Marketing APIs for ad accounts, campaigns, creatives, audiences, and analytics.
claim.mcpStatus: No official LinkedIn Ads MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: LinkedIn Marketing API access is gated by product/app approval.

claim.apiSurface: Broad REST, SOAP, Bulk, Metadata, Streaming, and GraphQL surfaces.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Salesforce MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Connected app setup and admin permissions.

claim.apiSurface: REST API for people, companies, opportunities, projects, tasks, and webhooks.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Copper MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Requires Copper account and API key from user/admin.

claim.apiSurface: Broad public CRM, marketing, files, events, and automation REST APIs.
claim.mcpStatus: No official HubSpot MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: OAuth scopes and account object variation.

claim.apiSurface: Documented REST API for DealCloud customers.
claim.mcpStatus: No official DealCloud MCP found in baseline.

claim.apiSurface: Broad REST API for deals, persons, orgs, activities, files, and webhooks.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Pipedrive MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Per-account API token handling and rate limits.

claim.apiSurface: Open-source API surface with REST and GraphQL-oriented platform docs.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Twenty MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Version drift between cloud and self-hosted deployments.

claim.apiSurface: Public REST API for objects, records, lists, comments, notes, tasks, and webhooks.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Attio MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Object model mapping and scope design.

claim.apiSurface: Broad REST APIs for support, help center, chat, users, and webhooks.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Zendesk MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Admin token setup and product-specific APIs.

claim.apiSurface: Very broad Web API, Events API, Socket Mode, workflows, and app surfaces.
claim.mcpStatus: Official and community Slack MCP servers exist.
claim.mainBlocker: OAuth review, workspace install, and granular scopes.

claim.apiSurface: Large gRPC/REST API for accounts, campaigns, ads, assets, reports, and conversions.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Google Ads MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Developer token approval and OAuth consent.

claim.apiSurface: Very broad Admin GraphQL/REST, Storefront, webhooks, checkout, and app APIs.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Shopify MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: App install, scopes, and store/admin permissions.

claim.apiSurface: Broad REST APIs for SERP, keywords, backlinks, domain analytics, merchant, and on-page data.
claim.mcpStatus: No official DataForSEO MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Credit pricing and many endpoint families.

claim.apiSurface: Very broad REST and GraphQL APIs across repos, issues, PRs, actions, orgs, users, and security.
claim.mainBlocker: Permission model and org install review.

claim.apiSurface: Public REST API for pages, databases, blocks, comments, users, and search.
claim.mcpStatus: No official Notion MCP found in baseline.
claim.mainBlocker: Workspace install and database schema variation.
